metadata.description: Polished AI agent skills for Claude Code — multi-model design review, code review, and consensus validation

plugins.name: tasteful-design
plugins.description: AI-powered design review and flow audit — 7 specialist agents with structured JSON output, curated few-shot calibration, and opt-in Playwright interaction capture

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Multi-model PR code review using Claude, Codex, and Gemini in parallel — 7 agents, confidence scoring, 3-tier degradation

plugins.name: consensus
plugins.description: 3-model consensus validation — validate any conclusion with independent analysis from Claude, Codex, and Gemini. Confidence-scored 1-10
